title: Yoga is as effective as strengthening exercises for knee osteoarthritis pain relief, study finds
summary: Exercise therapy is suggested as a first-line treatment to improve joint pain and loss of function caused by osteoarthritis (OA), a musculoskeletal disorder that affects more than 595 million people worldwide. Yoga and strengthening exercises are both known to be effective ways of managing knee OA, but is one better than the other?

title: 3-year-old boy dies after being bitten by rabid dog in Uttar Pradesh
summary: Tragic death of Anshu from rabies prompts health officials to launch preventive measures for other child victims.

title: Researchers breach brain-blood barrier, deliver medicine precisely via nanoparticles
summary: Science & Technology | World: People with cachexia lose weight even if they eat. The debilitating syndrome affects up to 80% of advanced cancer patients and kills as many as 30% of the cancer patients it afflicts.

title: 4 Health Benefits of Coconut, Plus Tips for Eating It
summary: Coconut is a popular fruit often touted for its health benefits. Evidence suggests it may help support healthy weight, blood sugar, cholesterol, and more.

title: I swear by my ‘old school’ one-ingredient anti-ageing face mask - it’s only 24p and prevents wrinkles and eye bags
summary: A BEAUTY guru has revealed the one-ingredient anti-ageing face mask she swears by for wrinkle-free skin.So if you want to ensure your face stays looki

title: Doctors Just Found Something Horrifying in the Brains of Heavy Alcohol Drinkers
summary: Boozers beware: a new study has found links between heavy alcohol consumption, brain damage, and even earlier death.

title: Cancer hijacks your brain, steals your motivation − new research in mice reveals how, offering potential avenues for treatment
summary: Cancer: This loss of motivation doesn't just deepen patients' suffering, it isolates them from family and friends. Because patients struggle to engage with demanding therapies that require effort and persistence, it also strains families and complicates treatment.

title: Ultra-processed foods linked to changes in brain regions that control eating behavior, study finds
summary: A large brain imaging study finds ultra-processed foods are tied to obesity, inflammation, and altered brain structure.

title: Oysters Could Be the Key to Fighting Drug-Resistant Superbugs
summary: Drug-resistant bacteria are one of the most urgent threats in modern medicine. But scientists are looking to oysters for help, thanks to their powerful immune proteins, which work synergistically with antibiotics. This breakthrough offers hope in the global fight against antibiotic-resistant infections.

title: 5 health problems that could raise your risk of dementia
summary: An NHS doctor has warned of five health conditions that have been identified in research as contributing factors for dementia
